style_effects: Constant static sparks of bright cyan and electric yellow flicker around Lapras's body, drifting upward in erratic patterns like tiny lightning bolts. A pulsing electromagnetic aura of vibrant electric blue radiates from its core, distorting the air with subtle heat haze, while its eyes and tail emit rhythmic pulses of white-hot energy. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
